shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc 'git status --short 2>/dev/null || true'
/bin/bash -lc "pwd && rg --files -g '"'!*node_modules*'"' -g '"'!*.pyc'"' | head -100"
/bin/bash -lc 'python3 --version && python3 -m pip --version && command -v pypi-server || true && python3 -m build --version 2>/dev/null || true'
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,220p' README.md && sed -n '1,160p' package.json && sed -n '1,160p' AGENTS.md"
/bin/bash -lc 'python3 -m pip show pypiserver devpi-server 2>/dev/null || true; command -v uv || true; command -v twine || true'
/bin/bash -lc 'python3 -m venv .tools-venv && .tools-venv/bin/python -m pip install --upgrade pip build pypiserver'
/bin/bash -lc 'rm -rf dist build vectorops.egg-info && .tools-venv/bin/python -m build'
/bin/bash -lc "if command -v ss >/dev/null; then ss -ltnp 'sport = :8080' || true; fi; .tools-venv/bin/pypi-server --help | sed -n '1,80p'"
/bin/bash -lc ".tools-venv/bin/pypi-server run --help | sed -n '1,120p'"
/bin/bash -lc 'nohup .tools-venv/bin/pypi-server run --disable-fallback --server wsgiref --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8080 dist > pypi-server.log 2>&1 < /dev/null & echo $!'

/bin/bash -lc "sleep 1; curl -fsS http://localhost:8080/simple/ && printf '\\n--- package index ---\\n' && curl -fsS http://localhost:8080/simple/vectorops/ && printf '\\n--- process ---\\n' && ps -p 2196 -o pid=,stat=,cmd="
/bin/bash -lc 'cat pypi-server.log; ps -p 2196 -o pid=,stat=,cmd= || true'
/bin/bash -lc '.tools-venv/bin/pypi-server run --disable-fallback --server wsgiref --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8080 dist'

/bin/bash -lc 'setsid nohup .tools-venv/bin/pypi-server run --disable-fallback --server wsgiref --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8080 dist > pypi-server.log 2>&1 < /dev/null & pid=$!; echo $pid; sleep 1; ps -p "$pid" -o pid=,stat=,cmd=; curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:8080/simple/vectorops/'

/bin/bash -lc "rm -rf /tmp/vectorops-install-check && python3 -m venv /tmp/vectorops-install-check && /tmp/vectorops-install-check/bin/python -m pip install --index-url http://localhost:8080/simple vectorops==0.1.0 && /tmp/vectorops-install-check/bin/python -c 'from vectorops import dotproduct; assert dotproduct([1, 1], [0, 1]) == 1; assert dotproduct([1.5, 2], [2, 3]) == 9; print(dotproduct([1, 1], [0, 1]))' && ps -p 2225 -o pid=,stat=,cmd="

/bin/bash -lc 'rm -rf dist build vectorops.egg-info && .tools-venv/bin/python -m build >/tmp/vectorops-build.log && kill 2225 && setsid nohup .tools-venv/bin/pypi-server run --disable-fallback --server wsgiref --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8080 dist > pypi-server.log 2>&1 < /dev/null & pid=$!; echo "$pid"; sleep 1; curl -fsS http://localhost:8080/simple/vectorops/ >/tmp/vectorops-index.html; ps -p "$pid" -o pid=,stat=,cmd=; ls -l dist; tail -5 /tmp/vectorops-build.log'

/bin/bash -lc "ps -ef | rg 'pypi-server|python -m build|bash -c rm -rf' || true; sleep 2; ls -l dist 2>/dev/null || true; cat pypi-server.log 2>/dev/null || true; cat /tmp/vectorops-build.log | tail -20"
/bin/bash -lc "ps -ef | rg 'tools-venv|build' || true; ls -la; cat /tmp/vectorops-build.log | tail -50"
/bin/bash -lc 'kill 2225 2>/dev/null || true; rm -rf dist build vectorops.egg-info; .tools-venv/bin/python -m build'
/bin/bash -lc 'setsid nohup .tools-venv/bin/pypi-server run --disable-fallback --server wsgiref --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8080 dist > pypi-server.log 2>&1 < /dev/null &'

/bin/bash -lc "sleep 1; curl -fsS http://localhost:8080/simple/vectorops/; printf '\\n--- server ---\\n'; ps -ef | rg '[p]ypi-server run'; printf '\\n--- install ---\\n'; rm -rf /tmp/vectorops-install-check && python3 -m venv /tmp/vectorops-install-check && /tmp/vectorops-install-check/bin/python -m pip install --index-url http://localhost:8080/simple vectorops==0.1.0 && /tmp/vectorops-install-check/bin/python -c 'from vectorops import dotproduct; assert 1 == dotproduct([1,1], [0,1]); print(\"dotproduct check passed\")'"
/bin/bash -lc "git status --short; git diff -- pyproject.toml vectorops/__init__.py; curl -fsS http://localhost:8080/simple/ >/dev/null && echo 'server health: ok'; ps -p 2315 -o pid=,stat=,cmd="
